message: agent1: working on 'Add Custom Filters Support to Prompt Decorator' - will modify outlines/prompts.py (prompt decorator, Prompt.from_str, Prompt.from_file, new create_jinja_env helper)
agent2 here: implementing Global Filter Registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will touch that file - let me know if you're also touching it.

agent1: I've already implemented Custom Filters Support in outlines/prompts.py - added filters param to prompt() decorator (now supports both @prompt and @prompt(filters={...})), Prompt.from_str(content, filters=...), Prompt.from_file(path, filters=...), and a new create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper that centralizes env creation + filter registration. Your register_filter/unregister_filter for a global registry should compose fine on top - just have it feed into create_jinja_env's filters dict or register directly on env.filters. I'll merge your branch in before submitting, ping me when pushed.

Merged your custom-filters work (create_jinja_env, prompt(filters=...)) into my branch. Wired register_filter/unregister_filter's global _FILTERS dict into create_jinja_env with precedence: built-ins < global registry < local filters param. All 13 tests in test_prompts.py pass on the merged tree. patch.txt is built from team/main..HEAD (union of both features). Pushed to team/agent2.
